title: randia armata
intro: Randia armata, also known as the armored randia or armadillo ball, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a woody shrub native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Randia armata include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction.
